name: Durgarn Thord Sword
setBonus: DPS: +1% Recharge Speed and Action Point Gain. Tank: +1% Stamina Regeneration and Action Point Gain. Healer: +1% Movement Speed and Action Point Gain. Once you reach 6 stacks of Scalebreaker's, they are consumed and you are empowered with Scalebreaker's Wrath for 30 seconds, granting the following, depending on your role: DPS: +7.5% Base Damage Boost. Tank: +7.5% Incoming Damage. Healer: +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing. You may only have 1 stack of Scalebreaker's Wrath at a time and the duration is refreshed each time you reach 6 stacks of Scalebreaker's.

name: Antique Mace of the Vale
setBonus: Adventurer's Might: When you use an encounter power, you have a 10% chance to receive a Boost based on your role by 4% for 10 seconds. DPS: Recharge Speed. Tank: Stamina Regeneration. Healer: Action Point Gain.

name: Fortified Mace of the Vale
setBonus: Adventurer's Might: DPS: +5% Power. Tank: +5% Awareness. Healer: +5% Outgoing Healing. When you use an encounter power, you have a 15% chance to increase a Boost based on your role by 7.5% for 10 seconds. DPS: Recharge Speed. Tank: Stamina Regeneration. Healer: Action Point Gain.

name: Grand Alliance Mace
setBonus: Brute's Expertise: When you are 25' or closer to your target, a stat based on your role and Forte is increased by 3%. DPS: Power. Tank: Awareness. Healer: Outgoing Healing.
